calendar.matters:
Plaintiff Carol Levine'S Motion For Relief From Dismissal [Ccp 473(B)].
Off Calendar Feb-09-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: William M. Balin, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff. Plaintiff Carol Levine, present in court.
Plaintiff Carol Levine's Motion for Relief from Dismissal is heard this day. After argument of counsel. Court adopted tentative ruling to deny motion. Motion is denied. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Plaintiff Carol Levine'S Motion For Relief From Dismissal [Ccp 473(B)].
Off Calendar Jan-12-2012 Continued To Feb-09-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Carol Levine's Motion For Relief From Dismissal [CCP 473(b)] is scheduled this day. William M. Balin, Esq. appearing specially for the plaintiff. No other appearance. Discussed and the court vacated its tentative ruling. The matter is continued to 2/09/2012 at 2:00 PM in Department 610. Plaintiff to submit a supplemental brief by Jan. 31, 2012. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Dismissal [Ccp 473(B)]
Off Calendar Dec-22-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CAROL LEVINE'S MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DISMISSAL [CCP 473(B)].
No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: the motion is transferred to Department 610 to be heard on January 12, 2012 at 2:00 p.m. Department 610 issued the dismissal and therefore, that is the department that will hear this motion.
(302/MJM) Judge: Marla Miller, Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR #11918

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-31-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: There being no appearance, nor objection filed, the court ordered the case dismissed. This dismissal is pursuant to CCP 583.210 and 583.250. Proceedings not reported. (610)
